name: Sea 4 Ventures
industry: Family Friendly Fishing and Eco Charters
description: Sea 4 Ventures is owned and operated by Chris & Lilly Rogers. Both retired bomb techs from the Public Safety and Military respectively. Capt Chris will show you all the Gulf waters have to offer from reef fishing, site seeing the beautiful emerald waters to dolphin tours. Up to 6 guests can enjoy a fun filled  4, 6, or 8 hour charters, or ask for something specialized from our site. 15% discount for EOD. 10% for all services veterans, and first responders and special needs families. Special rates for EOD students and AIED classes.
